rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee contracts in annex agree blocks within component type annexes for structural properties and implementation annexes for binding/assignment statements
Use assign statements only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
generic_rules: Use eq declarations for named boolean ranges and const for typed constants in AGREE contracts
Generate assumptions from input envelopes and guarantees from output ranges with visible feature names
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq name : type = expression; for named equation declarations
Use const name : type = value; for constant declarations
Use assign output = expression; for output assignments in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use assume/guarantee only in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property names like Compute_Deadline directly as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints not directly tied to visible features
Boolean data range comparisons without explicit numeric scalar representation
AADL standard references not directly related to AGREE syntax or semantics
